description: Entities with the highest number of dependents. Before modifying any god node, check all usedBy references to assess blast radius. Inspired by Graphify's god_nodes analysis.

nodes.label: Button
nodes.note: Most imported component. ANY prop change affects 92+ files. Changes require full regression.

nodes.label: LoadingBox
nodes.note: Loading state shown on every screen. Visual changes affect entire app perception.

nodes.label: ErrorBox
nodes.note: Empty state shown when data array is empty. Paired with LoadingBox on every screen.

nodes.label: withAuth HOC
nodes.note: Wraps EVERY protected page. Auth logic change = app-wide routing change. Currently .jsx — migration to .tsx is BUG-022.

nodes.label: MyAxiosError
nodes.note: Error type used in every mutation's onError handler. Type change cascades through all screens.

nodes.label: userSlice
nodes.note: Auth token + user object. Read by every screen via useAppSelector. Shape change breaks everything.

nodes.label: InputField
nodes.note: Used in all form modals (add, edit). Prop changes affect every modal.

nodes.label: PaginationComponent
nodes.note: Bottom of every data table. Interface change affects all table screens.

nodes.label: AxiosGet/Post/Put/Patch/Delete
nodes.note: Every API call flows through these functions. Signature change breaks all services.

nodes.label: BASE_URL + REQUEST_CONFIG
nodes.note: BASE_URL and auth header config. Used by every API URL builder.
